channel.title: Treks on Pulkit Joshi
channel.description: Recent content in Treks on Pulkit Joshi

item.title: Kalsubai Peak: First Monsoon Trek in the Sahyadris
item.description: This is a brief account of my first trek in the Sahyadri range to the Kalsubai peak. Should you wish to skip reading the main content, please go to the end of the post where you will find key details about the trek. What a day to cherish! If I could summarize it in one line, it would be: When a 2815 feet plan fails, go for the 5400 feet one.
